comment:
comment_inserter.zig — Insert and replace doc comments in Zig source files.

 Provides utilities to:
   - Insert a `///` doc comment block above a declaration at a given line
   - Replace an existing doc comment block above a declaration

members.name: deinit
members.signature: fn deinit(self: InsertResult, allocator: std.mem.Allocator) -> void

members.name: insertComment
members.signature: fn insertComment(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, source: []const u8, line: u32, comment: []const u8) -> InsertResult

members.name: replaceComment
members.signature: fn replaceComment(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, source: []const u8, line: u32, comment: []const u8) -> InsertResult

members.name: extractCommentAtLine
members.signature: fn extractCommentAtLine(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, source: []const u8, line: u32) -> ?[]const u8

members.name: formatDocComment
members.signature: fn formatDocComment(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, comment: []const u8) -> []const u8
